name: Pipe Created Followed by Service Binary Path Update
notes: This rule triggers when a pipe is created and the service binary path is updated to connect to it.
bb_references: BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated
BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB: Pipe Has Been Created match with the same Pipe Name (custom)
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created), (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches Pipe Name (custom) is not N/A
when BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB: Pipe Has Been Created match with the same Pipe Name (custom), Source IP
thresholds: when BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB: Pipe Has Been Created match with the same Pipe Name (custom), Source IP
TD_list: APPLY Pipe Created Followed by Service Binary Path Update on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created), (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches Pipe Name (custom) is not N/A
AND when BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB: Pipe Has Been Created match with the same Pipe Name (custom), Source IP
RED_list: Event name: A Pipe Has Been Created Followed by Updating Service Binary Path to Connect to The Created Pipe
Event description: A Pipe Has Been Created Followed by Updating Service Binary Path to Connect to The Created Pipe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
